testcase.name: celsiusToFahrenheit > converts boiling point correctly

failure.message: expected 180 to be close to 212, received difference is 32, but expected 0.05

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 180 to be close to 212, received difference is 32, but expected 0.05 ❯ tests/converter.test.ts:7:38

testcase.name: celsiusToFahrenheit > converts freezing point correctly

failure.message: expected +0 to be close to 32, received difference is 32, but expected 0.05

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected +0 to be close to 32, received difference is 32, but expected 0.05 ❯ tests/converter.test.ts:12:36

testcase.name: celsiusToFahrenheit > converts body temperature correctly

failure.message: expected 66.60000000000001 to be close to 98.6, received difference is 31.999999999999986, but expected 0.05

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 66.60000000000001 to be close to 98.6, received difference is 31.999999999999986, but expected 0.05 ❯ tests/converter.test.ts:17:37
